title: calystegia macrostegia subsp. amplissima
intro: Calystegia macrostegia subsp. amplissima, also known as Island Morning Glory, is a perennial climbing plant native to the Channel Islands of California. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The Island Morning Glory is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing anxiety and stress, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
